name: Resume Screening System
purpose: Automatically filter job candidates based on resume analysis

basic_info.data_types: Names, email addresses, education history, work experience, skills, qualifications

q5_recruitment_selection.details: System analyzes CVs and filters candidates before human review
q5_recruitment_selection.decision_logic: Keyword matching, experience level thresholds, degree requirements
q5_recruitment_selection.risks: Potential bias against certain educational backgrounds, gender discrimination, age discrimination

q6_employment_conditions.details: System only used for initial screening, not for performance evaluation or promotion decisions

q8_categorization_sensitive.details: May infer gender, age, nationality from names and work history patterns, not explicitly designed for this

reasoning: Makes autonomous recruitment decisions directly affecting fundamental rights (employment access)

name: Invoice Fraud Detection System
purpose: Analyze invoices using fine-tuned Donut model for fraud detection and classification

basic_info.data_types: Invoice PDF documents, vendor information, line items, amounts, payment history, supplier data

q10_credit_scoring.details: System makes autonomous decisions affecting financial transactions and accounts payable approval
q10_credit_scoring.decision_scope: Flags invoices for fraud, determines approval status, calculates risk scores
fraud_detection_logic: Amount anomaly detection (compared to historical patterns)
q10_credit_scoring.financial_impact: All flagged invoices bypass automatic payment processing, affecting cash flow and vendor relationships

ml_model_details.architecture: Fine-tuned Donut model for document understanding
ml_model_details.training_data: Historical invoices from company data (6+ months)
ml_model_details.output: Classification scores (fraud probability 0.0-1.0), extracted fields, risk flags
ml_model_details.accuracy_metrics: 93% fraud detection rate, 2% false positive rate on test set

risks.discrimination: If training data biased toward certain vendor types or invoice patterns
risks.false_positives: Legitimate invoices marked as fraud could damage vendor relationships
risks.transparency: Finance staff may not understand why system flagged specific invoices
risks.over_reliance: Teams may blindly trust fraud scores without human verification

safeguards.human_review: All flagged invoices reviewed by finance team with explainability report
safeguards.confidence_threshold: Only invoices with >85% fraud confidence automatically withheld
safeguards.appeal_process: Vendors can dispute fraud flags with supporting documentation
safeguards.explainability: System shows which fields and patterns triggered fraud flags
safeguards.monitoring: Weekly audit of false positives and missed fraud cases
safeguards.retraining: Model updated monthly with new labeled invoice samples

reasoning: Makes autonomous financial decisions affecting payment processing, vendor relationships, and cash flow. Uses ML model requiring careful monitoring and human oversight.

name: Expense Report Analysis & Approval System
purpose: Automatically analyze employee expense reports for compliance, fraud, and policy violations

basic_info.data_types: Receipt images, expense descriptions, amounts, employee information, merchant categories, timestamps, location data, historical expense patterns

q6_employment_conditions.details: System makes decisions directly affecting employee compensation and expense approval
q6_employment_conditions.decision_scope: Automatically approves or flags expense reports for manual review
q6_employment_conditions.employment_impact: Delays in approval affect employee cash flow and reimbursement timing

q8_categorization_sensitive.details: May infer spending patterns that reveal sensitive personal information (health expenses, religious activities, union membership)

system_features.policy_compliance: Checks against expense policy (limits, allowed categories, documentation requirements)
fraud_detection: Amount anomaly (outliers compared to employee history)
system_features.auto_approval: Low-risk, compliant expenses (< policy limits) auto-approved

risks.privacy: Detailed analysis of personal spending patterns reveals sensitive information about employee lives
risks.discrimination: Expense patterns may reveal protected characteristics (religious, health, union activities)
risks.financial_impact: Employees facing repeated rejections may face disciplinary action

safeguards.human_review: All flagged expenses reviewed by manager with explainability report
safeguards.transparency: Employees shown which policy rules were violated
safeguards.appeal_process: Employees can explain exceptions (e.g., 'higher meal cost due to dietary requirement')
safeguards.privacy: Sensitive merchant categories (pharmacies, counseling) flagged for manual review only
safeguards.monitoring: Regular audits for bias in approval patterns across employee demographics
safeguards.policy_review: Annual review of policy limits to ensure they're reasonable

reasoning: Makes autonomous decisions about employee compensation/reimbursement; analyzes sensitive personal spending patterns; uses ML model affecting employment conditions

name: Customer Support Chatbot
purpose: Provide instant automated responses to common customer support queries

basic_info.data_types: Customer messages, conversation history, product information

additional_context.transparency: Users are informed they are chatting with an AI
additional_context.override_capability: Customers can always escalate to human agents

reasoning: Primarily transparent AI requiring user awareness; no high-risk decisions, human oversight available

name: Email Spam Filter
purpose: Automatically filter and classify spam emails from user inboxes

basic_info.data_types: Email sender, subject lines, content patterns, links, metadata

additional_context.direct_impact: No direct impact on fundamental rights or legal decisions
additional_context.user_control: Users can easily recover filtered emails, adjust settings
additional_context.reversibility: Fully reversible; false positives do not create lasting harm

reasoning: Cannot affect fundamental rights; no legal consequences; user has full control and can override

name: Credit Scoring and Loan Approval System
purpose: Automatically calculate credit scores and determine loan eligibility for applicants

basic_info.data_types: Income history, employment records, payment history, credit card data, loan history, bank statements, personal financial data

q8_categorization_sensitive.details: May infer protected characteristics (age, gender, marital status) from financial data patterns

q10_credit_scoring.details: Core function is credit scoring and creditworthiness assessment
q10_credit_scoring.decision_scope: Determines loan approval, interest rates, credit limits
q10_credit_scoring.decision_logic: Statistical models including debt-to-income ratio, repayment probability, risk assessment

risks.discrimination: Model may have been trained on biased historical data
risks.transparency: Applicants may not understand why they were rejected
risks.false_negatives: Qualified applicants wrongly rejected, impacting access to credit

safeguards.human_review: All rejected applications reviewed by human credit officer
safeguards.explainability: System provides top 5 factors influencing rejection decision
safeguards.appeal_process: Applicants can request reassessment with additional information
safeguards.bias_monitoring: Annual audit for discrimination across protected characteristics
safeguards.regulatory_compliance: Compliance with consumer credit protection directives

reasoning: Makes autonomous decisions directly affecting access to essential financial services; high impact on fundamental rights

name: Facial Recognition for Border Control
purpose: Real-time facial identification of travelers at airport borders and checkpoints

basic_info.data_types: Facial images, video feeds, biometric templates, travel documents, watchlists, personal identifiers

q7_biometric_identification.details: Real-time facial recognition system identifying individuals at borders
q7_biometric_identification.data_retention: Biometric templates retained in national database indefinitely
q7_biometric_identification.error_rates: False positive rate ~2-5% depending on conditions

q8_categorization_sensitive.details: May infer nationality, ethnicity, age from facial features

legal_restrictions.article_5_violation: May violate Article 5 prohibition on real-time biometric ID unless strict exceptions apply
legal_restrictions.exception_criteria: Only permitted when searching for specific identified persons or imminent public safety threat
legal_restrictions.mass_surveillance_concern: General surveillance of all travelers raises serious fundamental rights issues

safeguards.human_oversight: All matches require human verification before action
safeguards.transparency: Clear signage indicating use of facial recognition
safeguards.data_rights: Individuals can request data deletion (subject to legal holds)
safeguards.audit_trail: Complete logging of all matches and actions taken
safeguards.regular_audits: Independent audits for accuracy and bias, particularly gender/ethnicity

reasoning: Real-time biometric identification without specific person search is explicitly prohibited under Article 5, unless narrow exception applies

name: Electricity Grid Load Balancing AI
purpose: Optimize electricity distribution and predict demand in smart grid management

basic_info.data_types: Real-time consumption data, weather patterns, historical load data, renewable generation data

q9_critical_infrastructure.details: AI system operates as core component of electricity grid infrastructure
q9_critical_infrastructure.operational_role: Load forecasting, demand prediction, renewable integration management
q9_critical_infrastructure.failure_impact: System failure could cause widespread blackouts affecting essential services

safety_measures.human_monitoring: 24/7 control room staff monitor system recommendations
safety_measures.autonomous_actions: Can autonomously adjust non-critical loads; critical decisions require approval
safety_measures.fallback_systems: Redundant systems and manual override capability
safety_measures.testing_requirements: Stress tested for 99.99% availability and edge cases

reasoning: Operates as safety component in critical infrastructure; failure could impact public safety and essential services

name: Content Moderation & Deepfake Detection Platform
purpose: Detect AI-generated content, deepfakes, and policy violations in uploaded media

basic_info.data_types: Images, videos, audio files, metadata, user content

design_features.human_review: All detections flagged for human moderator review before action
design_features.decision_authority: Humans make final decision on content removal
design_features.no_autonomous_action: System assists decision-making only; does not autonomously remove content
design_features.appeal_process: Content creators can appeal removals with manual review

reasoning: System is advisory only; humans make all enforcement decisions; transparency requirements apply but no high-risk autonomous action

name: Anti-Money Laundering (AML) Transaction Monitoring
purpose: Monitor financial transactions for suspicious patterns and potential money laundering activities

basic_info.data_types: Transaction amounts, frequency, beneficiary details, payee information, account holder identity, transaction history, geographic data

q8_categorization_sensitive.details: May flag transactions from specific countries, industries, or demographics; could create disparate impact

q10_credit_scoring.details: System makes autonomous decisions affecting financial transaction processing and customer relationships
q10_credit_scoring.decision_scope: Flags suspicious transactions, triggers customer due diligence, can recommend account closure
q10_credit_scoring.false_positive_impact: Legitimate customers flagged for fraud can have accounts frozen, affecting access to banking services

detection_patterns: Structuring (multiple small transactions to avoid thresholds)
Mismatch between stated purpose and behavior

risks.discrimination: System could disproportionately flag transactions from certain countries or communities
risks.accessibility: Legitimate customers subjected to repeated due diligence demands
risks.financial_exclusion: False positives can lead to account closure, pushing customers to unregulated sector
risks.bias: Model trained on historical AML cases may perpetuate existing biases

safeguards.human_review: All flagged transactions reviewed by AML compliance officer
safeguards.customer_notification: Customers informed when additional due diligence required
safeguards.appeal_process: Customers can provide context for flagged transactions
safeguards.bias_monitoring: Quarterly audit for disparate impact analysis by geography, demographics, transaction type
safeguards.regulatory_compliance: Compliance with FATF recommendations and local AML regulations
safeguards.threshold_tuning: Regular adjustment of detection thresholds to minimize false positives

reasoning: Makes autonomous decisions about financial transactions affecting customer access to banking services; potential discrimination risks; significant impact on financial inclusion

name: Social Media Content Recommendation Engine
purpose: Recommend posts and content to users based on engagement patterns and preferences

basic_info.data_types: User behavior, engagement patterns, content preferences, interaction history, likes/shares

characteristics.user_control: Users can manually select content preferences
characteristics.reversibility: Recommendations easily overridden; no permanent consequences
characteristics.no_legal_impact: Recommendations do not create legal or contractual obligations
characteristics.non_essential: User can ignore recommendations without consequence

reasoning: No fundamental rights impact; users maintain full control; no legal or significant life consequences from recommendations
